heading: Short title
label: 77aaa Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Trust Indenture Act of 1939.”
notes: Short Title of 1990 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–550, title IV, § 401104 Stat. 2721Nov. 15, 1990“This title [amending sections 77ccc to 77eee, 77iii to 77rrr, and 77vvv of this title] may be cited as the ‘Trust Indenture Reform Act of 1990’.”
amendments: Short Title of 1990 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–550, title IV, § 401104 Stat. 2721Nov. 15, 1990“This title [amending sections 77ccc to 77eee, 77iii to 77rrr, and 77vvv of this title] may be cited as the ‘Trust Indenture Reform Act of 1990’.”
